judge_reason: Description B adds specific visual text (headline and caption) not mentioned in Description A, creating a potential hallucination where one side quotes text the other does not see.
original_image_tags: A clipping from the Washington Post, dated July 8, 1947, pasted onto the document. It is yellowed and has some blue pen markings over it.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned FBI archive page with a pasted newspaper clipping titled “Air Forces Intelligence Joins Search for Flying Saucers,” handwritten check marks and notes, and a stamped mark reading “RECORD” and “FBI JUL 15 1947.”*
